RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset Password
RESET_PASSWORD.DESCRIPTION: Enter the email address you use to log in to Software Arrows to get the password reset instructions.
RESET_PASSWORD.GO_BACK_TO_LOGIN: If you want to go back to the login page,

API.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Link za reset lozinke je poslan na zadani e-mail.
API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Nije uspjelo spajanje na Woot server. Molimo pokušajte ponovno.
